# Farah Ali — Tech Executive | AI Transformation Leader | Board Member | Advisor | Speaker

## Who is Farah Ali?

Farah Ali is a technology executive, keynote speaker, board member, and startup advisor based in the Seattle, WA area. She is currently VP of AI Transformation & Technology Growth Strategy at Electronic Arts (EA), where she defines EA's AI strategy and future technology roadmap, reporting to the CTO. The platform she leads supports 500 million global players.

She has 20+ years of experience in engineering leadership at world-class technology companies, including Microsoft (Bing Search team), eBay (Director of Engineering), and Electronic Arts. She is also the Co-Founder and former CTO of FreightWeb, a VC-backed logistics technology startup.

## Current Role

**VP, AI Transformation & Technology Growth Strategy — Electronic Arts (EA)**
- Defines EA's AI strategy and technology roadmap
- Led next-generation player platform serving 500M+ global users
- Grew engineering team from under 10 to 100+ engineers
- Reports directly to the EA CTO

## What Farah Does

Farah accepts a limited number of external engagements per year:

1. **Keynote Speaking** — AI transformation, engineering leadership, women in STEM, purpose-driven leadership, scaling platforms for billions of users
2. **Advisory & Consulting** — AI strategy, platform/infrastructure strategy, engineering org design, technical due diligence for investors
3. **Board Membership** — AI & technology companies, developer platforms, technology-driven marketplaces, non-profit boards

## Background & Career

- **Microsoft** — Software Engineer → Senior Engineering Leadership on Bing Search
- **eBay** — Director of Engineering; contributed to patents in inventory optimization
- **Electronic Arts** — VP of AI Transformation (current)
- **FreightWeb** — Co-Founder & CTO (VC-backed startup)
- **University of Washington** — Affiliate Professor, Software Entrepreneurship (CSE 490A / ENTRE 432)
- **Pakistani Women in Computing (PWiC)** — Co-Founder & Board Chair
- **One Good Act** — Founder & President (non-profit, economic empowerment)

## Awards & Recognition

- 2025 Inclusive Leader Award — National Diversity & Leadership Conference (NDLC)
- 2024 Women in STEM Groundbreaker — Global Women Asia
- EA Company-wide Teamwork Award — Purpose & Beliefs
- 2017 Women Worth Watching in STEM — Profiles in Diversity Journal

## Patents

- eBay: Inventory Listing Optimization for Online Marketplaces (demand projection for seller recommendations)
- Microsoft: Search & Information Retrieval Systems (Bing Search)

## Boards & Advisory Roles

Madrona Venture Labs (Advisor), Sofy.ai (Board Advisor), AboveBoard (Board Member/Advisor), Embedded Ventures (Advisor), UW Buerk Center for Entrepreneurship (Advisory Board), DALIX (Board Advisor), moveit.pk (Board Member/Advisor), Codeschool.pk (Board Advisor)

## Investment Portfolio

Active angel investor with a portfolio spanning fintech (NerdWallet), agtech (GrubMarket), cybersecurity (Corelight), proptech (Orchard), aviation (Skyryse), developer tools (Zoo), and venture fund positions.

## Speaking Topics

1. AI Transformation at Scale
2. Engineering Leadership in the Modern Era
3. Women & Underrepresented Groups in Tech
4. From Engineer to Entrepreneur
5. Building Technology for Billions
6. Purpose-Driven Leadership

## Community

- Grace Hopper Celebration speaker
- Girls Who Code — keynote speaker (3 consecutive years)
- Washington Business Week — Mentor
- WELead (UW Foster School) — Founding member
- SPRYNG Youth Career Fair — Sponsor (via One Good Act)
